name: kw:brainstorm
description_raw: Brain dump and compile knowledge before structuring a plan. Use when starting any non-trivial knowledge work — after a meeting, when tackling a new problem, or when you need to pull together what you know before planning.
description_normalized: Accepts raw brain dumps (meeting notes, scattered thoughts) and structures them into themes, tensions, and load-bearing questions before handing off to kw:plan.

frontmatter_yaml.name: kw:brainstorm
frontmatter_yaml.description: Brain dump and compile knowledge before structuring a plan. Use when starting any non-trivial knowledge work — after a meeting, when tackling a new problem, or when you need to pull together what you know before planning.

name: kw:plan
description_raw: Research past work and structure a knowledge work plan. Use when starting strategy docs, campaign plans, content briefs, research synthesis, or operational playbooks.
description_normalized: Auto-classifies work type (Strategy/Campaign/Brief/Research/Operations), launches parallel research agents against plans/ and docs/knowledge/, then writes a type-templated plan file.

frontmatter_yaml.name: kw:plan
frontmatter_yaml.description: Research past work and structure a knowledge work plan. Use when starting strategy docs, campaign plans, content briefs, research synthesis, or operational playbooks.

name: kw:confidence
description_raw: Gut-check what you know and don't know before proceeding. Use at any point to assess confidence, surface gaps, and decide whether to proceed or dig deeper.
description_normalized: Non-destructive mid-workflow interrupt that audits epistemic state (task understanding, information sufficiency, approach certainty, risk awareness) and re-anchors to the parent workflow after resolution.

frontmatter_yaml.name: kw:confidence
frontmatter_yaml.description: Gut-check what you know and don't know before proceeding. Use at any point to assess confidence, surface gaps, and decide whether to proceed or dig deeper.

name: kw:review
description_raw: Multi-reviewer quality check for knowledge work. Runs strategic alignment and data accuracy reviewers on plans, briefs, and strategy docs.
description_normalized: Dispatches two parallel reviewer agents (strategic-alignment-reviewer + data-accuracy-reviewer) against a knowledge work artifact and merges their P1/P2/P3 findings into a single severity-grouped report.

frontmatter_yaml.name: kw:review
frontmatter_yaml.description: Multi-reviewer quality check for knowledge work. Runs strategic alignment and data accuracy reviewers on plans, briefs, and strategy docs.

name: kw:work
description_raw: Execute a knowledge work plan. Break it into tasks, do the work, and track what happened. Use after planning to actually produce the deliverables.
description_normalized: Loads a plan file, decomposes it into dependency-ordered task batches, executes each batch (parallelising where safe), and appends an execution log to the plan file for kw:compound to harvest.

frontmatter_yaml.name: kw:work
frontmatter_yaml.description: Execute a knowledge work plan. Break it into tasks, do the work, and track what happened. Use after planning to actually produce the deliverables.

name: kw:compound
description_raw: Extract and save learnings from a completed knowledge work session. Saves to docs/knowledge/ so future plans automatically find them.
description_normalized: Scans session for 1-3 compoundable learnings (insight/playbook/correction/pattern), requires user approval, checks for duplicates and stale entries via stale-knowledge-checker agent, then writes YAML-frontmatter markdown to docs/knowledge/.

frontmatter_yaml.name: kw:compound
frontmatter_yaml.description: Extract and save learnings from a completed knowledge work session. Saves to docs/knowledge/ so future plans automatically find them.

name: knowledge-base-researcher
description_raw: Search docs/knowledge/ for saved learnings that are relevant to the current topic. Returns insights, corrections, playbooks, and patterns from past sessions. This is the agent that closes the compounding loop.
description_normalized: Greps docs/knowledge/ by keyword and YAML tag to retrieve past learnings, grouping results as Directly Relevant / Tangentially Relevant / Not Found, and flags stale or low-confidence entries.

frontmatter_yaml.name: knowledge-base-researcher
frontmatter_yaml.description: Search docs/knowledge/ for saved learnings that are relevant to the current topic. Returns insights, corrections, playbooks, and patterns from past sessions. This is the agent that closes the compounding loop.

name: past-work-researcher
description_raw: Search plans/ and docs/solutions/ for related past work. Returns structured findings of what was decided, what data was used, and what worked. Use when /kw:plan needs to ground a new plan in prior context.
description_normalized: Globs plans/ and docs/solutions/ for keyword matches, reads top 3-5 relevant files, and returns structured findings (decisions, data used, outcomes, unresolved questions) to ground new plans in prior context.

frontmatter_yaml.name: past-work-researcher
frontmatter_yaml.description: Search plans/ and docs/solutions/ for related past work. Returns structured findings of what was decided, what data was used, and what worked. Use when /kw:plan needs to ground a new plan in prior context.

name: stale-knowledge-checker
description_raw: After a new learning is extracted, search docs/knowledge/ for entries that the new learning contradicts or supersedes. Returns candidates for update or removal. Prevents knowledge base from accumulating contradictions.
description_normalized: Runs after kw:compound extracts a new learning; scans docs/knowledge/ for contradicted, superseded, or complementary entries and returns update/remove/keep recommendations without writing any files.

frontmatter_yaml.name: stale-knowledge-checker
frontmatter_yaml.description: After a new learning is extracted, search docs/knowledge/ for entries that the new learning contradicts or supersedes. Returns candidates for update or removal. Prevents knowledge base from accumulating contradictions.

name: strategic-alignment-reviewer
description_raw: Use this agent when you need to review knowledge work artifacts (plans, briefs, strategy docs, campaign proposals) for strategic alignment. This includes checking whether goals are explicit, hypotheses are falsifiable, success metrics are measurable, scope is proportional to impact, and the work serves stated objectives.
description_normalized: Reviews plans and briefs for strategic soundness across 7 criteria (goal clarity, falsifiability, metrics, scope, resources, consistency, opportunity cost), returning P1/P2/P3 findings grouped by severity.

name: data-accuracy-reviewer
description_raw: Use this agent when you need to verify that numbers, metrics, and data claims in knowledge work artifacts are accurate, sourced, and fresh. This includes checking that every number has a cited source, comparison baselines are explicit, data matches canonical definitions, and known caveats are acknowledged.
description_normalized: Verifies every data claim in a knowledge work artifact against 7 criteria (source citation, baselines, canonical definitions, freshness, caveats, hardcoded vs live, baseline appropriateness), returning P1/P2/P3 findings.
